metadata.title: ASL Sign Language Pose Sequences Reference
metadata.description: Words and sentences formable using the verified pose list. All pose names are exact matches from the provided pose list.

YES.description: Fist nods forward and back twice, like nodding the head yes

steps.action: Close hand into a fist
Bend wrist forward then back — repeat twice (nodding motion)

NO.description: Index and middle finger snap down to thumb twice

steps.action: Extend index finger, others closed
Extend middle finger alongside index
Snap both fingers down closed — repeat

HELLO.description: Open-palm salute from forehead swept outward

steps.action: Open hand flat, touch forehead in salute position
Sweep hand away outward from face

THINK.description: Index finger taps the side of the forehead

steps.action: Extend index finger only
Tap index fingertip to forehead

KNOW.description: Flat open hand taps fingertips to forehead

steps.action: Open all fingers flat
Tap fingertips to forehead

FORGET.description: Open hand wipes across forehead, closes into fist as it leaves

steps.action: Open hand placed at forehead
Sweep hand away, closing fingers into fist

ME.description: Index finger points to and touches own chest

steps.action: Extend index finger on right hand
Point finger at and touch chest

YOU.description: Index finger points outward toward the other person

steps.action: Extend index finger on right hand
Palm faces east, pointing toward person

PLEASE.description: Open palm placed on chest, rub in circular motion

steps.action: Open palm facing inward (west)
Place palm flat on chest, rub in circle

SORRY.description: Closed fist rubbed in a circle on the chest

steps.action: Close all fingers into a fist
Place fist on chest, rub in circular motion

THANK YOU.description: Flat hand touches chin then extends outward toward person

steps.action: Open all fingers flat
Touch fingertips near chin / lower face
Move hand forward away from face toward person

GOOD.description: Flat right hand touches chin, drops into open left palm

steps.action: Open all fingers flat
Touch right fingertips near chin / face
Left hand open, palm facing up to receive
Drop right hand down onto left palm, palm facing down

STRONG.description: Flex right arm into a bicep / muscle pose

steps.action: Flex right arm into bicep muscle pose

STOP.description: Right hand chops down sharply onto open left palm

steps.action: Left hand open, palm facing up
Right hand in blade/karate position, palm facing east
Chop right hand down onto left palm

HELP.description: Right thumb-up fist rests on left palm; both lift upward

steps.action: Left hand open, palm facing up
Right thumb extended up, other fingers closed
Place right fist on left palm, lift both hands upward

WAIT.description: Both hands open, palms up, fingers flutter slightly

steps.action: Right hand open, palm facing up
Left hand open, palm facing up — both held out together

GIVE.description: Hand near chest, palm up, extends outward toward recipient

steps.action: Right hand near chest, open
Palm open facing up
Extend hand forward away from body

RECEIVE.description: Both hands open palms up, draw inward toward chest

steps.action: Right hand open, palm facing up
Left hand open, palm facing up
Draw both hands inward toward chest

MAYBE.description: Both palms alternate up and down like a balance scale

steps.action: Right hand open, palm facing up
Left hand open, palm facing up
Alternate right palm down while left stays up — repeat

sentences.grammar_note: Both signs flow naturally one after the other.

pose_sequence.action: Open hand flat, touch forehead in salute position
Sweep hand away outward from face
Open all fingers flat
Touch fingertips near chin / lower face
Move hand forward away from face toward person

sentences.grammar_note: ME establishes the subject; STRONG is the comment (topic-comment structure).

pose_sequence.action: Open hand flat, touch forehead in salute position
Sweep hand away outward from face
Extend index finger on right hand
Point finger at and touch chest
Flex right arm into bicep muscle pose

sentences.grammar_note: PLEASE at start adds politeness; ME at the end is the object of HELP.

pose_sequence.action: Open palm facing inward (west)
Place palm flat on chest, rub in circle
Left hand open, palm facing up
Right thumb extended up, other fingers closed
Place right fist on left palm, lift both hands upward
Extend index finger on right hand
Point finger at and touch chest

sentences.grammar_note: Short, direct polite request. Both signs flow smoothly.

pose_sequence.action: Open palm facing inward (west)
Place palm flat on chest, rub in circle
Right hand open, palm facing up
Left hand open, palm facing up — both held out together

sentences.grammar_note: Polite but firm. STOP is a clear two-hand sign.

pose_sequence.action: Open palm facing inward (west)
Place palm flat on chest, rub in circle
Left hand open, palm facing up
Right hand in blade/karate position, palm facing east
Chop right hand down onto left palm

sentences.grammar_note: GIVE directionally points toward ME indicating the recipient.

pose_sequence.action: Open palm facing inward (west)
Place palm flat on chest, rub in circle
Right hand near chest, open
Palm open facing up
Extend hand forward away from body
Extend index finger on right hand
Point finger at and touch chest

sentences.grammar_note: ME establishes subject; SORRY on chest conveys the apology.

pose_sequence.action: Extend index finger on right hand
Point finger at and touch chest
Close all fingers into a fist
Place fist on chest, rub in circular motion

sentences.english: I am sorry. You are good.
sentences.grammar_note: Two-part sentence. YOU shifts reference; GOOD completes the compliment.

pose_sequence.action: Extend index finger on right hand
Point finger at and touch chest
Close all fingers into a fist
Place fist on chest, rub in circular motion
Extend index finger on right hand
Palm faces east, pointing toward person
Open all fingers flat
Touch right fingertips near chin / face
Left hand open, palm facing up to receive
Drop right hand down onto left palm, palm facing down

sentences.grammar_note: ASL opinion structure: subject → THINK → topic → comment.

pose_sequence.action: Extend index finger on right hand
Point finger at and touch chest
Extend index finger only
Tap index fingertip to forehead
Extend index finger on right hand
Palm faces east, pointing toward person
Open all fingers flat
Touch right fingertips near chin / face
Left hand open, palm facing up to receive
Drop right hand down onto left palm, palm facing down

sentences.grammar_note: MAYBE softens the suggestion. Natural in advice or negotiation context.

pose_sequence.action: Extend index finger on right hand
Point finger at and touch chest
Open all fingers flat
Tap fingertips to forehead
Right hand open, palm facing up
Left hand open, palm facing up
Alternate right palm down while left stays up — repeat
Left hand open, palm facing up
Right hand in blade/karate position, palm facing east
Chop right hand down onto left palm

sentences.grammar_note: Common social phrase. Three signs, smooth flow from head to chest.

pose_sequence.action: Extend index finger on right hand
Point finger at and touch chest
Open hand placed at forehead
Sweep hand away, closing fingers into fist
Close all fingers into a fist
Place fist on chest, rub in circular motion

sentences.grammar_note: Full polite request with gratitude. PLEASE and THANK YOU bookend the ask.

pose_sequence.action: Left hand open, palm facing up
Right thumb extended up, other fingers closed
Place right fist on left palm, lift both hands upward
Extend index finger on right hand
Point finger at and touch chest
Open palm facing inward (west)
Place palm flat on chest, rub in circle
Open all fingers flat
Touch fingertips near chin / lower face
Move hand forward away from face toward person

sentences.grammar_note: Directional instruction followed by gratitude. Very practical phrase.

pose_sequence.action: Left hand open, palm facing up
Right hand in blade/karate position, palm facing east
Chop right hand down onto left palm
Right hand open, palm facing up
Left hand open, palm facing up — both held out together
Open all fingers flat
Touch fingertips near chin / lower face
Move hand forward away from face toward person

sentences.grammar_note: Describes an exchange. YOU and ME establish the two parties clearly.

pose_sequence.action: Extend index finger on right hand
Palm faces east, pointing toward person
Right hand near chest, open
Palm open facing up
Extend hand forward away from body
Extend index finger on right hand
Point finger at and touch chest
Right hand open, palm facing up
Left hand open, palm facing up
Draw both hands inward toward chest

sentences.grammar_note: Simple affirmation. YES at the end emphasizes agreement or enthusiasm.

pose_sequence.action: Extend index finger on right hand
Palm faces east, pointing toward person
Open all fingers flat
Touch right fingertips near chin / face
Left hand open, palm facing up to receive
Drop right hand down onto left palm, palm facing down
Close hand into a fist
Bend wrist forward then back — repeat twice

sentences.grammar_note: Compliment followed by acknowledgment. KNOW tap to forehead signals awareness.

pose_sequence.action: Extend index finger on right hand
Palm faces east, pointing toward person
Flex right arm into bicep muscle pose
Extend index finger on right hand
Point finger at and touch chest
Open all fingers flat
Tap fingertips to forehead

sentences.grammar_note: Grateful compliment. Natural closing to a conversation.

pose_sequence.action: Open all fingers flat
Touch fingertips near chin / lower face
Move hand forward away from face toward person
Extend index finger on right hand
Palm faces east, pointing toward person
Open all fingers flat
Touch right fingertips near chin / face
Left hand open, palm facing up to receive
Drop right hand down onto left palm, palm facing down

sentences.english: Maybe you give. Maybe I receive.
sentences.asl_gloss: MAYBE YOU GIVE MAYBE ME RECEIVE
sentences.grammar_note: Negotiation phrasing. MAYBE repeated signals uncertainty on both sides.

pose_sequence.action: Right hand open, palm facing up
Left hand open, palm facing up
Alternate right palm down while left stays up — repeat
Extend index finger on right hand
Palm faces east, pointing toward person
Right hand near chest, open
Palm open facing up
Extend hand forward away from body
Right hand open, palm facing up
Left hand open, palm facing up
Alternate right palm down while left stays up — repeat
Extend index finger on right hand
Point finger at and touch chest
Right hand open, palm facing up
Left hand open, palm facing up
Draw both hands inward toward chest
